name: Five-Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 5 packages Dried Lima Beans, Great Northerns, Kidneys, Pintos, and Split Peas (16 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the beans; divide into four equal batches, about 3-3/4 cups each.
2. To Make One Batch of Soup: Wash one batch of beans.
a. Place in a large kettle with enough water to cover.
b. Bring to a boil; cook for 3-4 minutes.
c. Remove from heat, cover and let stand for 1 hour.
3. Tie spices in a cheesecloth bag.
4. Drain and rinse beans. Return to kettle; add spices and water.
5. Bring to boil. Reduce heat, cover and simmer 1-1/2 hours or until beans are tender, stirring occasionally.
6. Remove spices. Add tomatoes and heat through.
Yield: One batch makes 14 servings (3-1/2 quarts).
